textByHash.06f530ee9349c1c8dc0e56b34c4c30eb8cc1eb46: We are the righteous ones in his eyes alone.
textByHash.227a5b11d03c8b64ef168b4e7ec511747d154dd2: For they are not the chosen ones in Saradomin's eyes.
textByHash.54a9baa7cb27a0864c54aa77ebe117f771ed688c: If thine monsters visage does frighten thee, then tear it off I say... tear it off!
textByHash.6c8b87a9e86a405e7b4123a7871af2b90ac5f2a9: Where do we go for safety from these monsters... here, with our brethren!
textByHash.71b759903464d0c10a026a388c8f99a1b9660f7f: And let us smite these monsters unto their deaths.
textByHash.7954c2bad78b0c25ec37a2ac868ef157d7ea4794: Verily I urge you, my friends to take up your spades and farm your farms to feed our people in this blessed sanctuary.
textByHash.8df418a7e4a6b378263738ae8a40a09108f20690: And let there be no cave or shelter for their spawn until the end of days.
textByHash.c9ff706ab2b278c09f12ad7021316099835754aa: Let them not infest our cities and towns...
textByHash.d3dbdbf962f793a094bb351aef382a50f8c7b3a0: And lo, we become the power, indeed the force to stop these monsters in their tracks.
textByHash.ec0953624204990980518f5ad04c815519818d01: Saradomin will surely bless us for destroying those abominations!
textByHash.f475bc7349d92c7c4c8b50694797045880ed698e: For Saradomin will guide our sword arms and smash the enemies of humans till their bones become dust.
